subcodes.first_line: Praise and glory befit the Lord of Names and Creator of the heavens, Who hath uttered the exalted Word, whereupon there was a surging [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثناء مالک اسماء و فاطر سماء را لایق و سزاست که بکلمهٴ علیا نطق فرمود فی الحین ماج
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
